---
title: "Mrs Filby\'s Maria"
---

## Mrs Filby\'s Maria

**Author:** Sarah Anne Mercier
**Date:** 1871?
**Imprint:** London: Warne

### Notes

This work, of which no copy has been traced, appeared in Warne\'s Victoria Tales and Stories series, edited by CMY, and was reviewed in <i>MP</i> (April 1871), 418.  A reference to it in a letter to Anne Mercier suggests that it was written by her.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
